help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Get help and contact us
help.support_team: Our support team is here for you
help.a1: Group Deals is a platform where buyers join together to unlock bigger discounts.
help.a2: Browse available deals, join one you like, and wait for enough people to join.
help.a4: You can leave a group deal before it reaches its target.
help.q5: How do I get my refund?
help.a5: If a deal doesn't reach its target by the deadline, you are automatically refunded.
